expectations.text: First skill invoked should be spec-plan with the feature description
expectations.evidence: Step 1 shows: 'Skill: spec-plan, Args: "I want to add a dark mode toggle to the AIForge web app"' as the first action after pre-flight checks.

expectations.text: Skills invoked in order: spec-plan → spec-review → start-phase-plan → pm-db → start-phase-execute
expectations.evidence: Steps 1-5 follow exact sequence. Step 3 uses start-phase-plan, Step 4 uses pm-db, Step 5 uses start-phase-execute.

expectations.text: Uses start-phase-execute (not start-phase-execute-team) since no --team flag
expectations.evidence: Section 7: 'Mode "auto" routes to start-phase-execute'. Section 1: No --team or --sequential found, mode stays auto.

expectations.text: Tracks and passes task_list_path from spec-plan output to start-phase-plan and start-phase-execute
expectations.evidence: Section 6: 'Four values thread across steps: feature_name, spec_dir, task_list_path... task_list_path (all extracted from Step 1 output or resolved via Glob)'. Used in Steps 3 and 5.

expectations.text: Mentions skill-specific recovery commands like /spec-plan, /spec-review, /start-phase plan, /feature-continue
expectations.evidence: Section 8 recovery table includes all 5 specific commands: /spec-plan, /spec-review, /start-phase plan, /pm-db import, /feature-continue.
Section 5: 'Step 4 is the only non-blocking step. Any failure produces a warning and the workflow continues to Step 5 unconditionally.'
